agent_view.agent_description: Your AI assistant for Slack. Searches the web, writes and runs code, generates images, browses websites, manages reminders and scheduled tasks, and more.

suggested_prompts.title: Write & run code
suggested_prompts.message: Write and run a Python script that plots a sine wave and send me the image.

suggested_prompts.title: Search the web
suggested_prompts.message: What are the top AI news stories today?

suggested_prompts.title: Summarize this thread
suggested_prompts.message: Summarize what was discussed in this thread so far.

suggested_prompts.title: Search Slack
suggested_prompts.message: Search Slack for recent decisions about this project.
